subject: WS1.4 source-only ready; dependency still blocked
body: Fiery WS1.4 status: source/test adapter work is in graph-core only. Scratch jsonld@9 run confirmed expand/compact/frame shapes; processor import corrected for Node ESM default interop. Focused graph-core lint now only fails on unresolved jsonld and unsafe-return fallout from the missing dependency/types. I am holding packages/core/graph-core/package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml until Verdant lands/closes P5 or you explicitly clear the dependency path.
